content.alt: Wilken Telecom office reception and entrance
content.caption: The main reception — a restrained, brand-forward entrance that sets the tone for the floors above.

content.heading: The Brief
content.body: Wilken Telecom required a full interior fit-out for their Kampala headquarters — a multi-floor commercial tenancy that needed to function as both a productive working environment and a confident expression of the company's identity in the telecoms sector. The brief called for a contemporary corporate aesthetic with clear spatial hierarchy between client-facing and operational zones.

content.caption: The open-plan workstation floor — a clean, well-lit environment designed for focus and informal collaboration.

content.heading: Approach
content.body:
Our design strategy centred on establishing a consistent material palette — dark structural accents, warm wood-tone surfaces, and a restrained use of the Wilken brand colour — applied across reception, open-floor working areas, and enclosed meeting rooms. Lighting was treated as an active design element throughout: recessed cove profiles and pendant clusters define zones without disrupting the open ceiling plane.

The workstation layout prioritises natural light at the perimeter, with enclosed meeting rooms positioned at the core. A feature staircase and branded wall graphics provide legibility across floors and reinforce the company's market positioning at every circulation point.

items.alt: Meeting room with branded wall graphics
items.caption: An enclosed meeting room — full-height glazing maintains sightlines while acoustic panels control reverberation.
Executive office zone — bespoke joinery, integrated cable management, and acoustic ceiling treatment.

content.caption: The staff breakout area — a deliberate contrast to the workstation floor, designed to encourage informal exchange.

content.heading: Outcome
content.body: The completed fit-out delivers a workplace that functions efficiently across its full programme — from high-footfall client reception through to focused executive work. Wilken Telecom now occupies a space that communicates the scale and confidence of the business to every visitor, while giving their team an environment built around how they actually work.
